<a id="class-etrackorigins"></a>

# ETrackOrigins

**Inherits:** `Object`

Catalogue of where a Track can origininate from Maps platform labels to enums and logos.

## Methods

| `StringName`                                                 | [Track_Origin_toString](#class-etrackorigins-method-track-origin-tostring)(origin: [Track_Origins_enum](#enum-etrackorigins-track-origins-enum))         |
